subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Whosoever in this Day desireth to drink from the chalice of divine knowledge and attain unto the light of certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله هر نفسی الیوم اراده نماید از کاس عرفان بیاشامد و بنور ایقان فائز
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
